vocab.word: cost an arm and a leg
vocab.meaning: rất đắt đỏ, tốn rất nhiều tiền
vocab.example: My father surprised me with a luxury Swiss watch that must have cost an arm and a leg, but he insisted I deserved it for my promotion.

vocab.meaning: được truyền lại qua các thế hệ hoặc cấp bậc trong gia đình
vocab.example: I was gifted a gold pocket watch that has been passed down through the ranks of my family, originally belonging to my great-grandfather.

vocab.meaning: vô cùng hữu ích hoặc cực kỳ quý giá
vocab.example: The smartwatch my sister gave me is worth its weight in gold because it helps me stay organized and track my health throughout the day.

vocab.meaning: vô cùng sung sướng, hạnh phúc
vocab.example: I was absolutely over the moon when I unwrapped a sleek, limited-edition watch on my twenty-first birthday.

vocab.meaning: trường tồn với thời gian, bền vững qua năm tháng
vocab.example: The classic leather watch I received years ago has really stood the test of time; it still looks elegant and functions perfectly.
